raw: This pass provides free admission to Trustees properties that charge an admission free, but many Trustees properties do not. Please visit https://thetrustees.org/places/ to find out more about how this pass applies to different properties. This pass is a physical coupon pass that you can pick up at the Robbins Library, but not the Fox branch. You will need to select a reservation date, but you can apply the coupon discount on any date that you decide to go.
